mapper.select: SELECT id, name, status_hr, status_en FROM friends ORDER BY name ASC

SELECT other_user.id, other_user.full_name AS name, 'Prijatelj' AS status_hr, 'Friend' AS status_en FROM friend_requests fr INNER JOIN app_users other_user ON other_user.id = CASE WHEN fr.requester_user_id = #{userId} THEN fr.recipient_user_id ELSE fr.requester_user_id END WHERE fr.status = 'accepted' AND (fr.requester_user_id = #{userId} OR fr.recipient_user_id = #{userId}) ORDER BY other_user.full_name ASC

SELECT fr.id, fr.requester_user_id, requester.full_name AS requester_name, fr.recipient_user_id, recipient.full_name AS recipient_name, fr.chat_room_id, fr.status, fr.created_at, fr.responded_at FROM friend_requests fr INNER JOIN app_users requester ON requester.id = fr.requester_user_id INNER JOIN app_users recipient ON recipient.id = fr.recipient_user_id WHERE fr.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT fr.id, fr.requester_user_id, requester.full_name AS requester_name, fr.recipient_user_id, recipient.full_name AS recipient_name, fr.chat_room_id, fr.status, fr.created_at, fr.responded_at FROM friend_requests fr INNER JOIN app_users requester ON requester.id = fr.requester_user_id INNER JOIN app_users recipient ON recipient.id = fr.recipient_user_id WHERE fr.status IN ('pending', 'accepted') AND LEAST(fr.requester_user_id, fr.recipient_user_id) = LEAST(#{leftUserId}, #{rightUserId}) AND GREATEST(fr.requester_user_id, fr.recipient_user_id) = GREATEST(#{leftUserId}, #{rightUserId}) ORDER BY fr.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO friend_requests ( id, requester_user_id, recipient_user_id, chat_room_id ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{requesterUserId}, #{recipientUserId}, #{chatRoomId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE friend_requests SET status = #{status}, responded_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
